name: Pat Murray (via VanHollen.org)
subject: less than 3 days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
Friend, we need someone like Chris Van Hollen with a strong record of successfully standing up to the extremist Tea Party agenda and fighting for the values and priorities we share. Election Day is less than 50 days away, and we cannot afford to let up until we reach our goal.

Washington Republicans are ramping up their efforts to turn the tide of this election. In the past month alone, Republican presidential candidate Donald Trump, union-busting Republican Governor Scott Walker and failed Republican presidential candidate Carly Fiorina have all come to Maryland to support GOP efforts here.

We need to be prepared for whatever comes our way -- to do any less would be malpractice.

[**Please, chip in whatever you can right now >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91acb/70cdc2ba/471a7ba4/3975782/3681541442/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092716_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEPlease+chip+in+whatever+you+can&utm_campaign=em092716_2&source=em092716_2") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91acb/70cdc2ba/471a7ba4/3975783/3681541442/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em092716_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Donate+5+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092716_2&source=em092716_2")** **[Donate $10 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91acb/70cdc2ba/471a7ba4/3975780/3681541442/VEsF/ **[Donate $25 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91acb/70cdc2ba/471a7ba4/3975781/3681541442/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em092716_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+25+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092716_2&source=em092716_2")** **[Donate $50 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91acb/70cdc2ba/471a7ba4/397579e/3681541442/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em092716_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+50+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092716_2&source=em092716_2")** **[Donate $100 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91acb/70cdc2ba/471a7ba4/397579f/3681541442/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em092716_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Donate+100+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092716_2&source=em092716_2")** **[Donate $200 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91acb/70cdc2ba/471a7ba4/397579c/3681541442/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=em092716_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+200+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092716_2&source=em092716_2")** **[Or donate another amount to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91acb/70cdc2ba/471a7ba4/397579d/3681541442/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092716_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount+to+stand+with+C&utm_campaign=em092716_2&source=em092716_2")** The Republican party knows that Chris will be a fierce protector of our progressive values. He has been fighting the gun lobby, Citizens United and others since day one. We know that they would like nothing more than to keep him out of the U.S. Senate.

We must show them that we are ready for them and that this Senate seat is not for sale.

[**Our September FEC deadline is less than 3 days away. Can you pitch in tonight? >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91acb/70cdc2ba/471a7ba4/397579a/3681541442/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092716_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+Our+September+FEC+deadline+is+less+than+&utm_campaign=em092716_2&source=em092716_2")

Pat Murray
Campaign Manager
Van Hollen for Senate

Team -- Nate Silver just summed up our race. Every dollar spent goes _16 times further_ in New Hampshire than anywhere else in the battle for Senate control. That's why corporate special interests have spent $40 MILLION and counting to keep their rubber stamp, Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte, in office.
This is _exactly_ why we can't afford to miss any fundraising goals, including our $100,000 goal for this Friday's make-or-break FEC deadline. **Our race here in New Hampshire will likely decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court -- if we're going to push back against outside spending and elect Governor Hassan to the Senate, we need every single person to step up now, including you:**
Team, don't let corporate special interests distort Governor Hassan's record and buy this seat for Kelly Ayotte! **[Donate $3 or more today to help meet this goal, fight dark money attacks, secure the future of the Supreme Court, and send Maggie to the Senate to get Washington working for our families, not corporate special interests.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd9c9/2a380d31/16df4238/fd0aa3/127255317/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI3X0VPUS1TaWx2ZXJfdjEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160927_EOQ-Silver_v1&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Barack Obama
subject: Me and you, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
What's at stake | | Derek --

At the debate last night, we saw how crucial it is that we all roll up our sleeves and get involved in this race.

We saw exactly what's at stake: Either we elect the most qualified candidate in our nation’s history -- or we’re stuck with four years of a man who wears his ignorance as a badge of honor.

That difference is why I’m doing everything I can for Hillary. And I’m asking you to do this with me, Derek.

I know that my name isn’t on the ballot this time around. But all the values that you and I hold most dear -- all the principles we’ve fought for and all the progress we’ve made over the past eight years: They are on the ballot.

And so are tolerance, democracy, justice, and good education for our kids. Whether we’re able to spend the next four years reforming our criminal justice system or whether we’re going to turn a blind eye to the problem, whether we’re going to spend the next term making inroads against climate change or denying its very existence -- all of that is there when you vote. All of that is at stake.

There is only one candidate who’ll pick up the baton and continue the fight we’ve taken on over the past two terms.

That’s why I get so frustrated when I hear people say their votes don’t matter -- there’s no such thing as a meaningless ballot! And that’s why I keep saying that I’ll take it as a personal insult if we don’t get out the vote and have Hillary’s back all fall long.

Please -- for me, and for all the progress we’ve made these past eight years -- let’s band together one more time. We can’t afford not to act. We can’t afford not to fight our hearts out. We can’t afford not to elect Hillary. Yesterday’s debate made that more obvious than ever. **Can you chip in right now before Friday’s critical fundraising deadline to ensure that Hillary’s team meets their 2.5 million donor goal -- and that, come Election Day, our country rejects Donald Trump and all he stands for?**
| **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:
** | **[**Derek, donate now: $1**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY2MzQxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0NTQyMzIwS0&mt=1&rt=0) **
---
**[**Derek, donate now: $5**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjY2MzQxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0NTQyMzIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

**[**Derek, donate now: $25**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY2MzQxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0NTQyMzIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $50**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY2MzQxMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0NTQyMzIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**
Six weeks left -- join me, and let’s get this thing done.

Thanks,

Barack

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and help us reach our goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of the month:**

name: Paul Ryan
subject: Disqualifying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter -- After the debate, one thing remains clear: Hillary is not fit to be your Commander in Chief. Her scandals alone should disqualify her from ever holding a political office. Yet despite all of Hillary's disqualifying scandals, the liberal media wasted no time in declaring Hillary the winner of the debate. But let me tell you this - I'm energized. Conservatives are surging against Hillary Clinton and Nancy Pelosi, so if we're going to win, we need to act right now. This Friday's FEC deadline is our LAST chance to break their momentum. Will you step up? If you do, I will personally ensure your gift will be TRIPLE-MATCHED. body:
The FEC quarterly deadline is coming up on Friday at midnight. JOIN today and I'll match your support! |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810279:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)
Peter,

A few days ago I announced my biggest personal investment yet in this race. If you missed my message, you may have seen it reported in the media.

**I 've committed to match up to $2 MILLION in contributions** made before the Federal Election Commission's quarterly deadline at midnight on September 30th, to help us hit our critical $20 million fundraising goal!

The response so far has been amazing. Americans from all walks of life are sick and tired of Crooked Hillary's lies and the disgraced liberal media that runs cover for her.

People are joining Team Trump in HUGE numbers, and you may have seen the news that we've _shattered_ previous Republican Party grassroots fundraising records!

It's so important that we get every one of my supporters involved as we head into the final weeks of the campaign.

[**Join Team Trump today with a $250, $100, $50, $25, or a $5 special contribution, and I 'll match your contribution dollar-for-dollar up to $2 million so that it makes DOUBLE the impact in this fight!**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810279:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810280:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $500 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810280:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)**[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810281:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $200 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810281:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)**[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810282:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $100 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810282:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)**[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810283:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)**[CONTRIBUTE $25 = $50 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810283:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)**
Crooked Hillary has the entire political and financial establishment on her side, and they're putting in big money to prop her up and protect their rigged system.

**Her campaign and outside groups have already spent more than $150 million on ads - __more than 62,000 airings!__**

Most of these spots are totally dishonest attacks against me, which is no real surprise.

They can't defend her terrible record, and she has _ZERO_ real plan to improve life for hard-working Americans who are sick and tired of being taken advantage of!

Yet even with this massive spending advantage she's dropping in battleground state polls, while our poll numbers are on the rise.

**Just imagine what will happen once we hit our FEC deadline goal and redouble our media and advertising efforts - you can help put us over the top in this historic election!**

I'm in this race to win, so that we can end the rigged system in Washington and fight together to Make America Great Again! And I know we need to kick off October strong.

**That 's why I've committed to personally match up to $2 million in contributions made before midnight this Friday.**

[**We need you on board now more than ever. Make a special contribution today to help us grow Team Trump in your home state and all across the country.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810279:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)

I'll write a check to match your support dollar-for-dollar up to $2 million, and it will be a such a big help in hitting our $20 million end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

Thank you!

Best wishes,

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810279:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)

Donald J. Trump
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37810279:WYIHcabNC:m:1:876315805:3B9501CECBAF7B655BA3FEAB6DC315FD:r)** | Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Bill Bryant
subject: event tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant
body:
[Update Profile / Unsubscribe](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/private/igrfw8d7se/2I6/FP87cHS/unsubscribe/27563443)

---
| |
---
| | ****
---
| Friend

As we near the end of this election season, every moment and every dollar counts. We're working hard to contact voters through our ground program and our television ads. Right now, we're trying to raise funds to put a strong media buy on TV.

Some folks in the Bellevue area have graciously agreed to form a host committee and put together an event for **tonight,****September 28th at 13 Coins**. If you are free, please join hosts Governor Dan Evans, Senator Joe Fain, Senator Dino Rossi, Senator Slade Gorton, Honorable Rob McKenna, KCGOP Chairman Lori Sotelo, Bill Conner, John and Molly Otter, Mikal Thomsen, Phillip and Michelle Yin, and Sandra Boyd for this evening reception.

We'd love to see you there, but if you can't make it, please consider contributing to our campaign [here](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27563443/339/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbillbryantevent13coins).

**Tickets are available online[HERE](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27563443/341/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.billbryantforgovernor.com%2Fattend-an-event%2F2016%2F9%2F20%2Fevening-reception-at-13-coins-in-bellevue) **or you can contact Michelle Matheson at [(360) 329-2682](tel:%28360%29%20329-2682) or [michelle@billbryantforgovernor.com](mailto:michelle@billbryantforgovernor.com).

With the general election just around the corner, your support is crucial. I hope to see you at **13****Coins** (900 Bellevue Way NE #100, Bellevue WA 98004) this evening!

It's time for new leadership in Washington! ******Bill Bryant**
---
| | | | | | | [](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27563443/343/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FBillBryantWA)

---

---

subject: too close to call (Nate Silver)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7967425330652643328/1265255309081837568?refcode=e20160928&refcode2=e20160928nd&amount=25)
---
**72 hours left til our _last_ quarterly FEC deadline**
[**Pitch in $5 now to elect Katie >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7967425330652643328/1265255309081837568?refcode=e20160928&refcode2=e20160928nd&amount=25) Look, Nate Silver's analysis has confirmed: **Our race is simply too close to call.**

What does that mean for us? Simple -- it means whichever side that fights the hardest for the next 41 days will win this race. It also means we have to get to work right now.

[**Quick, will you rush a donation right away, before we hit the LAST FEC quarterly deadline of this election? There isn 't much time >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7967425330652643328/1265255309081837568?refcode=e20160928&refcode2=e20160928nd&amount=25)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7967425330652643328/1265255309081837568?refcode=e20160928&refcode2=e20160928nd&amount=25)
---
Pennsylvania is __the__ tipping point state of the entire election. Democrats MUST win here -- the alternative is too scary to contemplate. We're not exaggerating when we say everything depends on you. Friends, let's be the team who fights the hardest. _LET 'S WIN THIS._

[**Rush a donation TODAY, before Friday 's FEC deadline arrives >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7967425330652643328/1265255309081837568?refcode=e20160928&refcode2=e20160928nd&amount=25)

There's no time to waste --

Team Katie
| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/7967425330652643328/1265255309081837568?refcode=e20160928&refcode2=e20160928nd&amount=25)**

subject: These are Hillary’s deplorables -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want to share their stories with you. |

Friend, I want to introduce you to our donors. These are the men and women Hillary calls “deplorable”: “God bless you Mr. Trump, I am behind you all the way. I wish I had the means to give large donations but my little $10 a month is about all I can handle. God bless and keep you and your family safe.” -Alice “I am retired and on disability. I give when I can. I believe in Donald Trump. I want to give more but due to Obamacare, my disability insurance has nothing to pay. Go Trump.” -Deborah “Hi Mr. Trump soon to be president, I am a retired police officer and a vet with a tour in Iraq, also I am Latino and I am voting for you. I am a Republican and I will donate but I have to donate at the end of the month.” -Luis With our FINAL end-of-quarter deadline coming up fast, thousands of Americans are chipping in whatever they can to Make America Great Again! And I am PROUDLY MATCHING each and every one of their donations. Join them once again at this pivotal moment and I will MATCH your gift. CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> I'LL MAKE IT $200 CONTRIBUTE $65 >>> I'LL MAKE IT $130 CONTRIBUTE $50 >>> I'LL MAKE IT $100 CONTRIBUTE $35 >>> I'LL MAKE IT $70 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT These are the people Hillary Clinton wrote off as deplorable, irredeemable, and un-American. They’re hard-working, patriotic, passionate Americans who care about our country and just want a better future. They’re the heart and soul of our campaign, and more importantly, the heart and soul of our country. They’ve given $5, $10, $50 contributions, and it’s all added up. Just last month we raised a total of $90 million thanks to these patriots. I am indebted to these “deplorable” Americans, which is why I am honored to MATCH all contributions up to $2 MILLION. Join them, Friend, by making a contribution before the FEC deadline and I will MATCH it. Thanks, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> I'LL MAKE IT $200

clean_body: I want to share their stories with you. | Friend, I want to introduce you to our donors. These are the men and women Hillary calls “deplorable”: “God bless you Mr. Trump, I am behind you all the way. I wish I had the means to give large donations but my little $10 a month is about all I can handle. God bless and keep you and your family safe.” -Alice “I am retired and on disability. I give when I can. I believe in Donald Trump. I want to give more but due to Obamacare, my disability insurance has nothing to pay. Go Trump.” -Deborah “Hi Mr. Trump soon to be president, I am a retired police officer and a vet with a tour in Iraq, also I am Latino and I am voting for you. I am a Republican and I will donate but I have to donate at the end of the month.” -Luis With our FINAL end-of-quarter deadline coming up fast, thousands of Americans are chipping in whatever they can to Make America Great Again! And I am PROUDLY MATCHING each and every one of their donations. Join them once again at this pivotal moment and I will MATCH your gift. ---
Friends: According to the latest _Muhlenberg/Morning Call_ poll, 20% of voters in this race are still undecided -- **that 's more than enough to swing the election.**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5947846770800197632/-4498789263998976000?refcode=e20160928.2&refcode2=e20160928.2nd&amount=25)
---
[**Our task is simple: We have to get those undecided voters >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5947846770800197632/-4498789263998976000?refcode=e20160928.2&refcode2=e20160928.2nd&amount=25)
The things we're fighting for -- fairness, progress, opportunity -- are so important, but Toomey's special interest allies are spending __millions__ to stop us. Now, we're relying on you to fight back.

[**Pitch in before tomorrow 's end-of-quarter deadline to help us reach every single undecided voter and take this Senate seat back for Pennsylvania families.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5947846770800197632/-4498789263998976000?refcode=e20160928.2&refcode2=e20160928.2nd&amount=25)

**[FEC Deadline: Donate now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/5947846770800197632/-4498789263998976000?refcode=e20160928.2&refcode2=e20160928.2nd&amount=25)**
Look, every dollar we raise now goes straight out the door and into voter outreach. That means falling short of our $75,000 goal WILL make the difference between reaching the critical undecided voters we need to win, **and leaving the future of the Senate AND Supreme Court up to chance.**

The outcome of this race isn't just about politics, it's going to have a HUGE impact how our families make a living, how we educate our kids, how we live in retirement, and much more.

**With just 41 days to reach the remaining undecided voters, we have to act fast.**
[**Please, help us do it before the end-of-quarter deadline >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5947846770800197632/-4498789263998976000?refcode=e20160928.2&refcode2=e20160928.2nd&amount=25)
It's all on the line --

McGinty Polling Team
| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/5947846770800197632/-4498789263998976000?refcode=e20160928.2&refcode2=e20160928.2nd&amount=25)**

body:
We just alerted the media, so now we have to make sure it happens. |

Friend, Last night, I told you how close we were to breaking a fundraising record in a 24-hour period. I have news for you now, Friend... We SHATTERED it. Just look at what the media said: (CBS, 9/27/16) (Politico, 9/27/16) (Washington Post, 9/27/16) But we can’t quit while we’re ahead. We’re on path now to shatter a 48-hour fundraising record, and you could help us do it, Friend. Hillary is spending millions of dollars to lie about our movement. All money raised right now will help us fund an AD BLITZ to promote our message of a safer, freer, and more prosperous America. Please help us SHATTER our record for a 48-hour period by making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or even $3 -- any amount will help us right now. As I said last night, the press is closely watching our fundraising. Everything gets reported. Now it’s up to us to keep the momentum going, and show the media we’re ready to WIN. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, $3, or any other amount to help us SHATTER our 48-hour fundraising record. Thank you for all that you do, Eric Trump

My father always taught me that the secret to winning is to never quit while you’re ahead. We have to keep fighting, we have to keep pushing, we can’t get complacent and give up. This is our moment to surge in the polls to win big this November. Now help us SHATTER our record for a 24-hour period by making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25 or even $3 -- any amount will help us right now. Thanks, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Elizabeth Warren for RussFeingold.com
subject: I've got news for Senator Ron Johnson
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Winning in Wisconsin will help us take back the Democratic majority in the Senate. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf459b/1c469400/e597f4/357b045/3012153321/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema") Friend, John Stumpf, the CEO of Wells Fargo, still doesn't think the rules apply to him. The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau caught Wells Fargo in a massive scam where the bank secretly opened millions of accounts without their customers' permission to boost the bank's fees. Executives like Stumpf made hundreds of millions off their fraud -- and then pushed the blame onto low-level employees. I've called on Stumpf to resign and to return every nickel he was paid while this fraud was happening, and I've urged the Department of Justice to investigate Stumpf. Russ Feingold was one of the first to join me in demanding Stumpf's resignation, and he asked his grassroots team to join the call. **Russ stood with me and with working families, the way he always has. Now, he needs us to stand with him.** **[Russ is up against his final end-of-quarter deadline of this Senate campaign, and he needs your help. Will you contribute $5 to help Russ reach his $250,000 goal?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf459b/1c469400/e597f4/357b045/3012153321/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf459b/1c469400/e597f4/357b045/3012153321/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf459b/1c469400/e597f4/357b045/3012153321/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf459b/1c469400/e597f4/357b042/3012153321/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf459b/1c469400/e597f4/357b041/3012153321/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Russ would be a breath of fresh air on the Senate floor, where the big banks and giant corporations have been calling the shots for far too long. He's principled, he's hardworking, and he's always been a champion for working families. We need him in this fight.
Wisconsin is a top battleground state. A recent poll showed Russ within single digits of his opponent, incumbent tea party Republican Senator Ron Johnson.
**This race is going to be close. We need to work together and do everything we can to make sure Russ wins in November.**
Senator Johnson has the NRA, the Koch brothers, THREE super PACs, and 11 right-wing groups supporting him. That's a lot of dark, right-wing money. He thinks they're going to buy this race for him.
But I've got news for Senator Johnson: the people of Wisconsin, not the powerful interests, get to decide who their senator is going to be. And it's going to be someone who won't be there just to fight for the millionaires, billionaires, and big corporations. It'll be someone who isn't afraid to fight the special interests and stand up and fight for the people of Wisconsin.
That person is my friend: Russ Feingold.
Winning in Wisconsin will help us take back the Democratic majority in the Senate. **[Donate before Russ's big deadline at midnight on September 30 -- even $5 makes a big difference.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf459b/1c469400/e597f4/357b045/3012153321/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema")**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren

body:
| |

| Everyone, this could not be more serious. Patrick Murphy is up against Marco Rubio for Florida's Senate seat, in one of the most competitive races in the country. If we lose, Marco Rubio gets another term. **Senate control is at stake here.**[**Contribute $10 now >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df7/738133e4/314b143a/7f8541c3/55834041/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928bf?refcode=pme160928bf_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Patrick works hard to make our shared Democratic values a reality for all Americans. He supports working and middle class families. He knows climate change is a very real threat -- one we have to address. He'll keep advocating to strengthen Social Security and Medicare. And most importantly, he's got what it takes. I know he'll show up and work hard for the people of Florida.

We **need** him to be Florida's next Senator. It's incredibly important. Patrick can win this race, but he needs us with him now. [**Can you join me and chip in $10 to help Patrick meet his $200,000 End-of-Quarter goal before midnight tonight?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df7/738133e4/314b143a/7f8541c3/55834041/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928bf?refcode=pme160928bf_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

The GOP knows Patrick can defeat Marco Rubio and help Democrats retake the Senate. Rubio's right wing backers are spending millions to defeat Patrick and all that we stand for. There are only **41 days** left until the election: it's now or never. We don't want to look back and regret missing this chance. Democrats are counting on us to win this critical seat -- and this deadline is so important to the campaign.

If we win in Florida, we can retake the Senate. [**Donate $10 now to help Patrick meet his goal before the FEC End-of-Quarter deadline -- the last of this election.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df7/738133e4/314b143a/7f8541c3/55834041/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928bf?refcode=pme160928bf_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Thank you,
Barney Frank

|

subject: One thing is clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter -- After the debate, one thing remains clear: Hillary is not fit to be your Commander in Chief. Her scandals alone should disqualify her from ever holding a political office. Yet despite all of Hillary's disqualifying scandals, the liberal media wasted no time in declaring Hillary the winner of the debate. But let me tell you this - I'm energized. Conservatives are surging against Hillary Clinton and Nancy Pelosi, so if we're going to win, we need to act right now. This Friday's FEC deadline is our LAST chance to break their momentum. Will you step up? If you do, I will personally ensure your gift will be TRIPLE-MATCHED. name: Roy Cooper
subject: From the beginning, friends.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It's been 352 days since we announced our campaign, friends. Now, the election is just 41 days away.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12024da/2fde7c66/40fe646d/156a8247/583722864/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-sep16eoq?utm_campaign=fnd_sepeoq2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_160928_fnd_gq_sepeoq2_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
It's been 352 days since we announced our campaign, friends. Since then, I've traveled the state and met folks all along the way who are fed up with Governor McCrory's divisive political ideology. People are ready to move North Carolina in the right direction. **Now, the election is just 41 days away -- our biggest fundraising deadline of the race just two days away. My team tells me we need to raise $100,000 online before the deadline, can you help us out?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12024da/2fde7c66/40fe646d/156a8246/583722864/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-sep16eoq?utm_campaign=fnd_sepeoq2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_160928_fnd_gq_sepeoq2_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")

body:
Please make it your priority to fill out the Debate Preparation Survey. |

Friend, The next debate against Hillary Clinton is just 11 days away. I need your immediate feedback from the first debate in order to win the second one. Please take the TRUMP Debate Preparation Survey now. >> The race is close. We can’t leave anything up to chance. But because you got me to where I stand today, I’m turning to you. This is your moment to help shape the direction of the presidential race, and ultimately the direction of our country. Debate preparation is already underway, so you’ll need to get your input in immediately. Friend, I want your honest input. I cannot win this fight alone. Please take the TRUMP Debate Preparation Survey now. >> Thank you, Donald J. Trump TAKE SURVEY NOW

body:
Following a debate victory for Democrats, the only thing that could save Republicans is watching us fall short of our fundraising goal. So we announced a TRIPLE MATCH...
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160928-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

[**Don 't miss out, Friend! Pitch in for 4X the impact >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160928-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend, Mitch McConnell is FREAKING OUT about what just happened:
-> **FIRST,** Monday night's debate made the need for bold Democratic leadership (in the White House and Senate) crystal clear!

-> **THEN,** President Obama, Vice President Biden, and First Lady Michelle Obama ALL urged you to [**seize the moment and pitch in before it passes us by!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160928-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

-> **NOW,** McConnell's right-wing extremists are reeling - because Trump's meltdown could doom GOP candidates in swing states! What can possibly save them? Falling short of our critical FEC end-of-quarter fundraising goal - **and unless Democrats step up today, that 's exactly what will happen! **

With the clock ticking down, we've got to show our stamina!

**That 's why we've announced a TRIPLE-MATCH until the end-of-quarter deadline! Pitch in toward our one million dollar goal and help us seal a Democratic victory! **

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160928-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160928-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160928-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160928-Triple_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

The triple-match won't last forever, Friend. **[Please take advantage of it today>>](https://secure.dscc. Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f663/2b07114c/7cdc6dfb/739fcc68/3754352915/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Joe Biden
subject: this matters, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df4/738133e4/3143db48/7f854129/1690093275/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme1609jb?refcode=pme1609jb_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| Everyone,

For nearly 40 years, I served as a U.S. Senator from Delaware. I understand the Senate. I understand that sometimes things work, and sometimes they don't. But the Senate today is the most dysfunctional I can remember. The good news is: we can fix it by electing Patrick Murphy and putting Democrats back in charge.

I've campaigned across the state for Patrick because I believe in him. **He 's the real deal, but he needs our support. **He's being attacked by right-wing groups because he isn't afraid to stand up for what's right. And they know the Senate race in Florida is critical in this election cycle. If we win here, we have a real chance of turning the Senate blue. [**Can you chip in to Patrick 's campaign before the End-of-Quarter FEC deadline?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df4/738133e4/3143db48/7f854129/1690093275/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme1609jb?refcode=pme1609jb_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

This race matters, team. As opposed to his opponent, Patrick will actually show up to work and fight for Florida families in the Senate. The choice in this election couldn't be clearer.

[**But Patrick needs to raise $200,000 before his final End-of-Quarter deadline. I 'm with him in this race -- if you are too, please click here to make a contribution.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df4/738133e4/3143db48/7f854129/1690093275/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme1609jb?refcode=pme1609jb_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Thanks,
Joe Biden

|

name: Barney Frank
subject: Taking down the right-wing machine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I have firsthand experience with how the right-wing machine operates to win elections. And I can tell you how we stop it.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160928-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend, I have firsthand experience with how the right-wing machine operates to win elections.

It's a shockingly effective mix of smears, flat-out lies, and seven-figure checks from the Koch brothers to bankroll misleading ads for every swing voter in America.

And in our post-_Citizens United_ era, we can bet on it getting worse heading to Election Day.

[**That's why I'm joining the DSCC to bring dignity back to our democracy. Will you stand with me and pitch in before Friday's deadline to elect a Democratic Senate this November?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160928-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

If we don't fight relentlessly for our Democrats, there's no way we can expose Republicans' stupidity in denying climate change, desire to roll back women's reproductive rights to a time before _Roe v. Wade_ , or insistence on dissolving Social Security.

Dark money won't let us win on the merits alone anymore -- so when we're looking at the best Senate map in years, we've got to step up our offense in every battleground state to flip just 4 GOP seats and take back the majority.

****I genuinely believe that with every grassroots supporter, we can finally take down the right-wing machine. Please join me and pitch in before Friday to help the DSCC elect a Democratic Senate.**

****[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160928-Frank-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

Dark money won't let us win on the merits alone anymore -- so when we're looking at the best Senate map in years, we've got to step up our offense in every battleground state to flip just 4 GOP seats and take back the majority. **I genuinely believe that with every grassroots supporter, we can finally take down the right-wing machine. Please join me and pitch in before Friday to help the DSCC elect a Democratic Senate. ** "" "" "" "" "" "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5"** Thank you, Barney Frank Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 120 Maryland Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Senator Barbara Mikulski
subject: When they say you don't "look the part"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0fd1/24c69fd9/1656fff7/18e843ce/2530799536/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEU61N_digital_email_20160928_Mikulski_n-all&source=WPEFEU61N_digital_email_20160928_Mikulski_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Growing up I knew I wanted to serve my community, but I was thinking of becoming a scientist or a nun -- politics was for old guys in smoke-filled rooms. I never saw myself as a senator, and even when I decided to run in 1986 it looked like an uphill battle. Members of the old boys' club kept saying I didn't "look the part." With the help of EMILY's List we proved the old boys' club wrong, and I became the first Democratic woman elected to the Senate in her own right. We're hearing the same things this year about Hillary that they said about me 30 years ago -- she doesn't look the part. Donald Trump actually said she doesn't have "a presidential look."

It's time to prove them wrong again.

**[Donate $3 to help hit EMILY's List's End-of-Quarter goal and show everyone out there that it's time to put a woman in the White House and more women in Congress.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0fd1/24c69fd9/1656fff7/18e843cf/2530799536/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160926_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+hit+EMILYs+Lists+EndofQ&utm_campaign=WPEFEU61N_digital_email_20160928_Mikulski_n-all&source=WPEFEU61N_digital_email_20160928_Mikulski_n-all")**

This election is personal for me.

Hillary Clinton is a dear friend, and I was honored to be able to nominate her, the first woman major-party presidential nominee, at the Democratic National Convention. She's sharp as a tack, and one of the most caring people I know. I can't imagine anyone more ready to be president.

But it's also a scary election, and we're in for a real fight. We can elect Hillary, and we can help flip the Senate and elect more women to the House. But we need your help to do it.

**Make sure women have resources to win in November. Donate $3 to help hit EMILY's List's End-of-Quarter goal:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/EOQ-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0fd1/24c69fd9/1656fff7/18e843c8/2530799536/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160926_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgEOQGoal&utm_campaign=WPEFEU61N_digital_email_20160928_Mikulski_n-all&source=WPEFEU61N_digital_email_20160928_Mikulski_n-all")**

Thank you,

Senator Barbara Mikulski

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0fd1/24c69fd9/1656fff7/18e843c9/2530799536/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160926_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEU61N_digital_email_20160928_Mikulski_n-all&source=WPEFEU61N_digital_email_20160928_Mikulski_n-all")

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0fd1/24c69fd9/1656fff7/18e843ca/2530799536/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPEFEU61N_digital_email_20160928_Mikulski_n-all&source=WPEFEU61N_digital_email_20160928_Mikulski_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: Peter -- are you standing up to the Koch brothers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Everyone who's paying attention, from the local media all the way to the Koch brothers, will know it.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6620664851482413056/6910914966069839872?utm_campaign=fnd_sepeoq_3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160928_fnd_gq_sepeoq_ndn_3_kj&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, We need to raise another $17,931 to reach our final end-of-quarter goal by Friday -- but let's look beyond the numbers. Every dollar you contribute is another tool we can use to fix the testing mess, make pre-K available to our kids, and create good-paying jobs for Hoosiers. The bad news is that folks on the other side want to use their dollars to stop you. But they need to know that Indiana's ready to move forward -- not backward. And we need you to tell them before Friday night. **Peter, will you chip in $5 or more and make your first donation now? name: Eric Hyers
subject: we can't get drowned out (new ad)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

**The contrast is clear in this election:**

Steve's worked across the aisle to balance the budget every year with a rainy day fund and no new taxes.

Greg Gianforte would spend the rainy day fund on tax breaks that benefit out-of-state corporations and millionaires like himself, undermining our fiscal discipline.

**Steve has the right approach.** But Mr. Gianforte is outspending us on TV by more than 4:1. If we're going to make sure Montanans know the stakes, we have to make sure ads like this don't get drowned out. [**Pitch in $15.**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=cxHx1MwhkPoLmWwpQaovMHuCDQUJzJQP)

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lc4CrCzTV%2BaYe113O4CkBnuCDQUJzJQP)

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager

name: Elizabeth Warren for RussFeingold.com
subject: I have news for Senator Ron Johnson
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Winning in Wisconsin will help us take back the Democratic majority in the Senate. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4596/1c469400/e1ef64/357bf7e/522928694/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema") Friend, John Stumpf, the CEO of Wells Fargo, still doesn't think the rules apply to him. The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau caught Wells Fargo in a massive scam where the bank secretly opened millions of accounts without their customers' permission to boost the bank's fees. Executives like Stumpf made hundreds of millions off their fraud -- and then pushed the blame onto low-level employees. I've called on Stumpf to resign and to return every nickel he was paid while this fraud was happening, and I've urged the Department of Justice to investigate Stumpf. Russ Feingold was one of the first to join me in demanding Stumpf's resignation, and he asked his grassroots team to join the call. **Russ stood with me and with working families, the way he always has. Now, he needs us to stand with him.** **[Russ is up against his final end-of-quarter deadline of this Senate campaign, and he needs your help. Will you contribute $5 to help Russ reach his $250,000 goal?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4596/1c469400/e1ef64/357bf7e/522928694/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4596/1c469400/e1ef64/357bf7e/522928694/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4596/1c469400/e1ef64/357bf7e/522928694/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4596/1c469400/e1ef64/357bf7f/522928694/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---
Russ would be a breath of fresh air on the Senate floor, where the big banks and giant corporations have been calling the shots for far too long. He's principled, he's hardworking, and he's always been a champion for working families. We need him in this fight.
Wisconsin is a top battleground state. A recent poll showed Russ within single digits of his opponent, incumbent tea party Republican Senator Ron Johnson.
**This race is going to be close. We need to work together and do everything we can to make sure Russ wins in November.**
Senator Johnson has the NRA, the Koch brothers, THREE super PACs, and 11 right-wing groups supporting him. That's a lot of dark, right-wing money. He thinks they're going to buy this race for him.
But I've got news for Senator Johnson: the people of Wisconsin, not the powerful interests, get to decide who their senator is going to be. And it's going to be someone who won't be there just to fight for the millionaires, billionaires, and big corporations. It'll be someone who isn't afraid to fight the special interests and stand up and fight for the people of Wisconsin.
That person is my friend: Russ Feingold.
Winning in Wisconsin will help us take back the Democratic majority in the Senate. **[Donate before Russ's big deadline at midnight on September 30 -- even $5 makes a big difference.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4596/1c469400/e1ef64/357bf7e/522928694/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-09-27_eoq6_ew_nd-rs&utm_campaign=eoq6&utm_medium=ema")**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren

subject: I need you to follow the money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
You and I know the media is going to lie and tell a different story. |

Friend, I just delivered a fiery speech attacking Hillary as the corrupt candidate bought-and-paid-for by special interests. You and I know the media is going to lie and tell a different story. But I need your help getting the truth out to the American people... And there’s one easy way: Follow the money... Hillary has received millions of dollars from Wall Street hedge funds. Meanwhile, 96% of my contributions just last month came from small-dollar donations. Follow Hillary Clinton’s money and it leads to special interests. Follow my money and it leads right back to YOU -- the American people. This election is our last shot to take back our country for the American people. Now is our moment to step up and make sure we win. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $15 or $5 to stand up to the special interests trying to buy America. Don’t forget about the closed-door speeches where she received $4.1 million in speaking fees from talking to financial focused audiences. And if she ever got the chance, she’d put the White House up for sale. Because I’ve shut the door on so many lobbyists and special interests who want to buy their way into a Trump presidency -- not going to happen -- I need your help going the extra mile with me by making a contribution to win. Together, we can beat the mega donors bankrolling Crooked Hillary’s campaign. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $15 or $5 to stand up to the special interests trying to buy America. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Aisling Kerins
subject: I need to tell Jay on Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Here's why we need our television ads up and running.

Dear Friend,

Working on campaigns, I've learned the importance of having a second-to-none grassroots ground game working hand-in-hand with ads that break through the clutter.

That's why getting our television ads on air soon is a key part of maintaining our momentum over the next five weeks. Whether we can or not is a decision we must make on Friday.

Here's why it's important.

As we saw in the primary, Republican Bill Bryant can reach into the deep pockets of several millionaire friends and blanket the airwaves with misleading ads overnight.

As voters make their decision for governor, we can't afford to let Bryant and his rich allies dominate the airwaves.

That's why we have to be smart about putting our best message on TV over the next five weeks!

Will you pitch in and help us raise $25,000 by midnight Friday -- our big end-of-month deadline -- to get our television ads on the air over the next few critical weeks?

http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=OTU5ODUwMAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTAwMjMwODM5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

It's a big ask -- but friends and supporters like you have come through again and again. It means the world to Jay, and our campaign.

Thanks for helping make it happen.

Aisling Kerins

CONTRIBUTE: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=OTU5ODUwMAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTAwMjMwODM5MwS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: Michelle Obama
subject: It’s not enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
The difference between a win and a loss | | Derek --

Hillary brought everything she had to that stage on Monday night -- real plans, real proposals, and complete control of the facts. She more than did her job.

Now we have to do ours. It’s time for us to fight for her as hard as she’s fought for us. **[Friday is her team’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline -- the last quarterly filing of this election. Chip in now so her team can fight as hard as possible in these final weeks to reach their 2.5 million donor goal, and get a free sticker as a thank you.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY2NDM0NTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0NzI1NzIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I’ve been through two presidential campaigns with Barack, and trust me -- at this point in the race, we can’t have anybody on the sidelines. It’s not enough just to tune in to a debate or read an article once in a while. It’s time to go. It’s time to wear out those sneakers knocking on every door and talking to every voter we can -- we’ve got to get to work for Hillary.

But if Hillary’s team doesn’t hit their fundraising goals, her campaign will knock on fewer doors. This team will miss out on talking to voters who could tip the election. We won’t be able to fight as hard as we can -- and that could mean the difference between a win or a loss.

**It all depends on you, Derek. Your dollars fund the outreach. Your dollars will determine a win or loss. So let’s make sure that on November 9th, we wake up to a win:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY2NDM0NTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0NzI1NzIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Michelle

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and help us reach our goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of the month:**
| [

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---

clean_body: The difference between a win and a loss | | Derek -- Hillary brought everything she had to that stage on Monday night -- real plans, real proposals, and complete control of the facts. She more than did her job. Now we have to do ours. It’s time for us to fight for her as hard as she’s fought for us. I’ve been through two presidential campaigns with Barack, and trust me -- at this point in the race, we can’t have anybody on the sidelines. It’s not enough just to tune in to a debate or read an article once in a while. It’s time to go. It’s time to wear out those sneakers knocking on every door and talking to every voter we can -- we’ve got to get to work for Hillary. But if Hillary’s team doesn’t hit their fundraising goals, her campaign will knock on fewer doors. This team will miss out on talking to voters who could tip the election. We won’t be able to fight as hard as we can -- and that could mean the difference between a win or a loss. It all depends on you, Derek. Your dollars fund the outreach. Your dollars will determine a win or loss. So let’s make sure that on November 9th, we wake up to a win: Thanks, Michelle | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and help us reach our goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of the month: | to send us a message! subject: another &%#$* email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:

[](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504e0/7be36b49/1eae6c0d/78f84ac6/1495129892/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-septeoq?refcode=20160928.2nd&amount=10") I know what you're thinking, Friend. "Another &%#$* email asking for money." And yeah -- that's what this is. But let me explain why it is that we're emailing so much.

Here at Bayh HQ, we're frantically tallying up the resources we'll need to have a successful Election Day. I'm talking canvassers. Phone banks. Literature. TV, radio, and online ads. All of these things cost money. And we need to know by Friday's deadline which ones we can pay for (ideally, all of them).

**That 's why we have to keep coming to you -- because every donation counts, and gets us in a better position to elect Evan.**

**[Can you help us out by contributing $5 to our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504e0/7be36b49/1eae6c0d/78f84ac6/1495129892/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-septeoq?refcode=20160928.2nd&amount=10") Your gift will be matched through Friday's deadline.**

name: Marcia
subject: My son’s plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
I want to introduce myself. My name is Marcia Holcomb. I am a retired teacher, and I am Eric Holcomb’s mom. My days in the classroom may be behind me | | | | | [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/97b290dcf0f04365b5b0e4d1e7e8c604?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=8c1d73675f9b45fab562cd30fb3a6e21&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Image_Header_Logo&utm_term=education&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160928-my-sons-plan-16266-petition)
---
| | | | Friend, I want to introduce myself. My name is Marcia Holcomb. I am a retired teacher, and I am Eric Holcomb's mom. My days in the classroom may be behind me, but my desire to continue improving Indiana's education system is still a passion of mine -- _**because once a Hoosier teacher, always a Hoosier teacher.**_ **That is why I am so proud of my son 's plan for excellence in education and the reforms he defended during the education debate on Tuesday.** Now, I might be a bit biased. Not only am I Eric's mom, I was his teacher, too! After many conversations with my son about his plans to guide Indiana's education system, it is clear to me that the Holcomb-Crouch plan will make great progress for our state. It will improve graduation rates, ensure students leave high school with a meaningful diploma, and prepare our students to pursue higher education or enter the workforce. The Holcomb-Crouch plan begins with a focus on early childhood education. Eric is driven to expand access to this as early as possible to families with the greatest financial need by seeking state, federal and private resources that don't tie the hands of state and local education officials. Finally, the Holcomb-Crouch plan for education will protect the rights of Hoosier families and parents to choose the best educational setting for their children's needs through stronger school choice. **With Eric 's plan, we can ensure Hoosier education is the best in the nation and continue to move the state forward with commonsense, conservative reforms.** **[Join me and Hoosiers across the state by pledging your support to vote for Eric and help strengthen our education system.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/ef021d7d598b43be9cd1efec1eb789ce?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=8c1d73675f9b45fab562cd30fb3a6e21&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_term=education&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20160928-my-sons-plan-16266-petition)** Thank you,Marcia HolcombEric's mom and Former Hoosier teacher

clean_body: I want to introduce myself. My name is Marcia Holcomb. I am a retired teacher, and I am Eric Holcomb’s mom. My days in the classroom may be behind me | | | | | | | | | Friend, I want to introduce myself. My name is Marcia Holcomb. I am a retired teacher, and I am Eric Holcomb's mom. My days in the classroom may be behind me, but my desire to continue improving Indiana's education system is still a passion of mine -- because once a Hoosier teacher, always a Hoosier teacher. That is why I am so proud of my son 's plan for excellence in education and the reforms he defended during the education debate on Tuesday. Now, I might be a bit biased. Not only am I Eric's mom, I was his teacher, too! After many conversations with my son about his plans to guide Indiana's education system, it is clear to me that the Holcomb-Crouch plan will make great progress for our state. It will improve graduation rates, ensure students leave high school with a meaningful diploma, and prepare our students to pursue higher education or enter the workforce. The Holcomb-Crouch plan begins with a focus on early childhood education. Eric is driven to expand access to this as early as possible to families with the greatest financial need by seeking state, federal and private resources that don't tie the hands of state and local education officials. Finally, the Holcomb-Crouch plan for education will protect the rights of Hoosier families and parents to choose the best educational setting for their children's needs through stronger school choice. With Eric 's plan, we can ensure Hoosier education is the best in the nation and continue to move the state forward with commonsense, conservative reforms. Thank you,Marcia HolcombEric's mom and Former Hoosier teacher | | | | | | | | | Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000 annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs & political committees are not limited. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Barney and Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df0/738133e4/31453a0e/7f8542ae/2812629959/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928?refcode=pme160928_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")
---
| You heard from Vice President Joe Biden today.

You heard from Former Rep. Barney Frank as well.

**They know what 's at stake in Florida.** Control of the Senate could come down to what happens here in our race.

For some reason, we're still coming in short of our $200,000 FEC goal. This is the LAST quarterly deadline of the election. With polls as close as they are, we can't afford to let that happen. [_**Will you rush in a contribution? The deadline is in 48 hours, so we 're running out of time.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df0/738133e4/31453a0e/7f8542ae/2812629959/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928?refcode=pme160928_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Republicans know that if we start missing goals and deadlines, they can beat us. __They 're outspending us by nearly three to one.__

**I don 't want to hand them this race.** I will continue fighting as hard as I can to give Florida families the voice they deserve.

But I need your help. I can't win this without your support. And we're just 48 hours from the final quarterly deadline of the election. It's our most important one yet. We can't let it go by without hitting this $200,000 goal.

[_**So please, if you can give, give now. Even $5 or $10 will be a huge help.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df0/738133e4/31453a0e/7f8542ae/2812629959/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928?refcode=pme160928_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thank you for everything you've done. I know we can do this!

Patrick |

clean_body: | | | | "" | You heard from Vice President Joe Biden today. You heard from Former Rep. Barney Frank as well. They know what 's at stake in Florida. Control of the Senate could come down to what happens here in our race. For some reason, we're still coming in short of our $200,000 FEC goal. This is the LAST quarterly deadline of the election. With polls as close as they are, we can't afford to let that happen. "" Republicans know that if we start missing goals and deadlines, they can beat us. They 're outspending us by nearly three to one. I don 't want to hand them this race. I will continue fighting as hard as I can to give Florida families the voice they deserve. But I need your help. I can't win this without your support. And we're just 48 hours from the final quarterly deadline of the election. It's our most important one yet. We can't let it go by without hitting this $200,000 goal. "" Thank you for everything you've done. I know we can do this! Patrick | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | "" This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible. name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Critical Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

We have a critical end of the month finance deadline Friday. The race is neck and neck, but I need your help right now.

My opponent, career-politician Chris Koster has raked in almost $20 million from union bosses, lobbyists, lawyers and liberal special interests. He's using the money to attack our campaign and spread lies.

I need grassroots donors like you to [fight back](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=36c1ca90e4&e=84041254e6) against the big government, special interests.

I need you to step up and [join ](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=d45ae3b6ca&e=84041254e6)our mission. Please help us [spread the truth](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=8febaf3c93&e=84041254e6) right now about Chris Koster's record of corruption and our positive vision for Missouri by giving [$100, 50, or 25 or whatever you can afford.](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=b8cc497349&e=84041254e6)

We will win this race with your help

Best,
Eric
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=cbbbff2f54&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e62ffd6706&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=e1f5652be5), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=85f9117580&e=84041254e6) with us!

subject: the danger here is very real
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
We could very well lose | | Derek --

Yesterday, Donald Trump said that he raised $18 million during and after Monday’s debate.

If that’s true (and, look, we're talking about Donald Trump here, so who the heck knows), the danger that we'll get outraised this month is very real -- and if we’re outraised, we could very well lose.

Friday is our very last quarterly fundraising deadline, the one we've all been pushing toward for almost two years -- 7 people in your area need to step up right now and help us close this gap. **Will you be one of them by chipping in for the first time and to get your free sticker?** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY2NDU1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0NzY5Njc2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and join the 2.3 million grassroots donors standing with her:**
| [

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/forms/contact-us/) to send us a message! Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY2NDU1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0NzY5Njc2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now.
